prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Alzheimer's Disease
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 89.5 kg; Height 164.9 cm; BMI 32.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 180mg/dL; 9 months ago 173mg/dL; 6 months ago 187mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 160mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 87.1kg; 9 months ago 86.1kg; 6 months ago 88.7kg; 3 months ago 88.7kg; current 89.5kg), Height (12 months ago 164.9cm; 9 months ago 164.9cm; 6 months ago 164.9cm; 3 months ago 164.9cm; current 164.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 32.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 136mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 11U/L), AST (12 months ago 6U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 9.0U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 11U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; current 41mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 97mg/g; 9 months ago 92mg/g; 6 months ago 133mg/g; 3 months ago 120mg/g; current 101mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 99mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 142mg/dL; 9 months ago 129mg/dL; 6 months ago 131mg/dL; 3 months ago 129mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.2g/dL; 3 months ago 10.9g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
